description_long: This doll features an elongated, stylized human form with exaggeratedly thin arms and legs, and a slightly oversized head. It is dressed in a short-sleeved, knee-length tunic or dress in muted greenish-gray tones, paired with dark leggings and simple gray shoes. The doll's limbs are posed in a dynamic, wide-legged stance, suggesting movement or playfulness. The hands are simplified and lack detailed fingers, while the face is minimally detailed, with subtle features. The surface appears matte and smooth, with a soft, almost rubbery or plastic texture. The overall design is modern and abstract, suitable for display or imaginative play in urban environments.
description: A stylized, elongated doll in a greenish-gray tunic, dark leggings, and gray shoes, posed dynamically with outstretched limbs. The surface is matte and smooth, with minimal facial and hand details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, torso, and both arms extended outward, with the left leg forward and visible shoe details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the doll's profile, the curvature of the back, and the forward extension of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tunic, both legs, and the simplified back of the head and arms.
description_view_3: Angled view from behind, emphasizing the dynamic stance, the back of the right leg, and the side of the torso.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a short-sleeved, knee-length tunic or dress in muted greenish-gray, paired with dark gray or black leggings and simple gray slip-on shoes. The style is minimalist and modern, with no visible patterns or brand markings.
attribute_pose: The doll stands with legs wide apart, left leg forward, and both arms extended outward in a dynamic, action-oriented pose. The torso is slightly twisted, and the head faces forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a closed mouth, relaxed eyes, and no pronounced emotion.
attribute_hair_style: The doll has short, smooth hair, closely cropped to the head, with no visible parting or elaborate styling.
